hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.gleam$' && gleam format "$f"; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q '\.gleam$' && gleam run -m glinter 2>&1; } 2>/dev/null || true
